subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-10-07
subcodes.first_line: It is a great happiness to be here this evening, especially for the reason that the members of this Association have come from the region of the Orient.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب در نهایت سرورم که خودم را در بین این جمع
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @Muhammad; Islam, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @Christ; Christianity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
